channel.title: Insight Chronicles
channel.description: Independent long-form analysis on history, geopolitics, and technology.

item.title: ULI: India's Attempt at a UPI Moment for Credit
item.description: The Reserve Bank's Unified Lending Interface links land records, GST data and credit bureaus into one API layer for lenders — 64 institutions have joined so far, but two unglamorous bottlenecks are slowing it down.

item.title: Account Aggregators and OCEN: India's Third Rail After UPI and ONDC
item.description: After building open rails for payments and commerce, India built one for financial data and credit — the Account Aggregator framework and the Open Credit Enablement Network.

item.title: GeM: How India Turned Government Procurement Into Open Infrastructure
item.description: Government e-Marketplace (GeM) rebuilt how India's public sector buys goods and services — turning a slow, opaque tendering process into an open, competitive digital marketplace.

item.title: The Valuation Game: How the Top 10% Use the Middle Class as Their Exit Strategy
item.description: How India's wealthy elite use retail investors in stock markets and real estate to sustain inflated valuations and quietly cash out before the crash comes.

item.title: Democratization of India's Hardware, Manufacturing and Bio Labs Infrastructure
item.description: Why India must democratize access to machine tools, CNC facilities, 3D printing hubs and public bio labs.

item.title: How India's Plan of Democratizing Public Services Will Guide Other Countries
item.description: A breakdown of how UPI, ONDC, Aadhaar and ABHA form a model of open digital infrastructure.
